hero.title: Anime Awards
hero.subtitle: The community anime awards
hero.slogan: Vote for your favorite anime, characters, and moments of the year.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse all categories and nominees for this edition.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose your favorite in each category and submit your vote.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join our TikTok live to discover the winners in real time!

tiktok.title: Follow us on TikTok
tiktok.subtitle: Stay informed about the event and be the first to see the results live.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who are we?
about.description: The Anime Awards is an annual community event celebrating the best anime, characters, and moments of the year. Created by and for fans, this event gives the community a voice to elect their favorites.
about.whyDesc: Because fans deserve to have their say. We believe the community is the best judge to reward what made them passionate throughout the year.
about.whoDesc: Everyone! The event is open to all anime fans, without age or location restrictions. One vote per person.
about.howDesc: Winners are determined solely by community votes. No jury, no algorithm — just the voice of the audience.
about.ceremonyDesc: Winners are announced during an exclusive TikTok live. A celebration evening for the entire community.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Discover all categories for this edition

nominees.title: Nominees
nominees.subtitle: Discover all nominees for this edition

vote.title: Vote
vote.subtitle: Make your voice heard
vote.acceptRules: I accept the event rules and certify that I am voting only once.
vote.votingClosedDesc: Thank you to everyone who voted! See you on the TikTok live to discover the winners.
vote.votingNotOpenDesc: Come back soon to vote for your favorites.

errors.allCategoriesRequired: You must vote in all categories
errors.submitFailed: An error occurred. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Vote recorded!
confirmation.subtitle: Thank you for participating in the Anime Awards 2026
confirmation.message: Your vote has been successfully recorded. See you on our TikTok live to discover the winners in real time!
confirmation.inviteDesc: The more the merrier! Share the link so your friends can vote too.

questions.a: Everyone can vote! The event is open to all anime fans, without age or location restrictions.
No, only one vote per person is allowed. Multiple votes will be detected and canceled.
Winners are determined solely by the number of votes received. The nominee with the most votes in each category wins the award.

questions.q: When will the results be announced?
questions.a: Results will be announced during the final TikTok live. The exact date is shown on the home page.

questions.q: Can you see the results before the live?
questions.a: No, results remain secret until the live to preserve the suspense and community experience.

questions.q: What happens in case of a tie?
questions.a: In case of a perfect tie between two nominees, the organizer reserves the right to decide or declare two co-winners.

questions.q: Can I modify my vote after submitting?
questions.a: No, once your vote is submitted, it cannot be changed. Take your time to make your choices before confirming.
Yes, we implement anti-spam systems to detect and remove multiple or fraudulent votes.
